ranked.title: Write a guide about embedding Conduit
ranked.rationale: Very clear documentation task with good pointers to relevant code. High feasibility for an automated agent to generate a working example and guide.

ranked.title: Error codes needs to be documented in Swagger
ranked.rationale: Very clear documentation task with a specific target (Swagger). High feasibility for automation. Also includes a potential suggestion for improving the error codes themselves, which could be part of a follow-up.

ranked.title: Write a guide for setting up a pipeline (postgres -> kafka)
ranked.rationale: Clear documentation task, but requires setting up a complete, runnable example, including Docker, Postgres, and Kafka. This is a good candidate for automation.

ranked.title: Automate version constant update in built-in connectors
ranked.rationale: Clear housekeeping task to automate a manual process. Well-defined objective and scope.
